'''jamaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:raash|raash]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-m-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:raash|raash]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jamaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæmæjæth|jæmæjæth]] || [[word:jæmæjæj|jæmæjæj]] || [[word:jæmæjæsh|jæmæjæsh]] || [[word:jæmæjæ|jæmæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jamamajath|jamamajath]] || [[word:jamamajaj|jamamajaj]] || [[word:jamamajash|jamamajash]] || [[word:jamamaja|jamamaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jamajath|jamajath]] || [[word:jamajaj|jamajaj]] || [[word:jamajash|jamajash]] || [[word:jamaja|jamaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jamafjath|jamafjath]] || [[word:jamafjaj|jamafjaj]] || [[word:jamafjash|jamafjash]] || [[word:jamafjaf|jamafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jamajatha|jamajatha]] || [[word:jamajaja|jamajaja]] || [[word:jamajasha|jamajasha]] || [[word:jamajaka|jamajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jamajath|jamajath]] || [[word:jamajaj|jamajaj]] || [[word:jamajash|jamajash]] || [[word:jamaja|jamaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jamajathal|jamajathal]] || [[word:jamajajal|jamajajal]] || [[word:jamajashal|jamajashal]] || [[word:jamajakal|jamajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jamajathatha|jamajathatha]] || [[word:jamajajaja|jamajajaja]] || [[word:jamajashasha|jamajashasha]] || [[word:jamajaka|jamajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jamajathan|jamajathan]] || [[word:jamajajan|jamajajan]] || [[word:jamajashan|jamajashan]] || [[word:jamajakan|jamajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jamajathaoro|jamajathaoro]] || [[word:jamajajaoro|jamajajaoro]] || [[word:jamajashaoro|jamajashaoro]] || [[word:jamajakaoro|jamajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
